unclassified.reason: sibling-repo symlink → ../../mta-ployglot-server-bootstrap (read-only, upstream-owned, has its own .agent.md). No .gitmodules; symlink topology is laid by scripts/workspace/bootstrap.sh.
Makefile-only, no manifest. Ships the canonical 8-target package CI surface (help install ci-install lint test build clean ci) wrapping subtree-lint + bats + emitter idempotency + doctor.
internal-dev-harness (mta-server-parity, private:true) — runs both runtimes side-by-side and diffs output, not an app or library
